---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
---

<a href="DaniloFreireCV.pdf" class="cv-download-btn" download>Download CV (PDF)</a>

<iframe src="DaniloFreireCV.pdf" class="cv-embed" title="Danilo Freire CV"></iframe>

If your browser does not display the PDF, you can [download it directly](DaniloFreireCV.pdf).
